'''鈭歭-s-ng-y''' ('''kalasngeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wair|wair]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wair|wair]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-s-ng-y
|-
! Lemma
| kalasngeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilasngeyoko|thilasngeyoko]] || [[word:jilasngeyoko|jilasngeyoko]] || [[word:shilasngeyoko|shilasngeyoko]] || [[word:kilasngeyoko|kilasngeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulasngeyoko|thuthulasngeyoko]] || [[word:jujulasngeyoko|jujulasngeyoko]] || [[word:shushulasngeyoko|shushulasngeyoko]] || [[word:kukulasngeyoko|kukulasngeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholasngeyoko|tholasngeyoko]] || [[word:jolasngeyoko|jolasngeyoko]] || [[word:sholasngeyoko|sholasngeyoko]] || [[word:kolasngeyoko|kolasngeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalasngeyoko|thalasngeyoko]] || [[word:jalasngeyoko|jalasngeyoko]] || [[word:shalasngeyoko|shalasngeyoko]] || [[word:kalasngeyoko|kalasngeyoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
